violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. - Vent filters require a thorough cleaning.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory * was used for purpose other than handwashing. - Handwashing sink had beer caps and limes in it.
General premises. — --Window/door * used for ventilation purposes was not properly protected against the entry of insects and rodents. - Door left propped open in the back area. Flies in the kitchen
Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. - Mop not hung to drip and dry when not in use.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
